name: Thunder: The Life and Death of Arturo Gatti
original_name: Thunder: The Life and Death of Arturo Gatti
overview: Thunder dives deep into the thrilling yet tragic story of boxing legend Arturo Gatti, exploring his life, his rise in the boxing world, and the haunting mysteries surrounding his untimely death. This series brings an unparalleled look at Gatti’s legacy, with exclusive footage, insightful interviews, and gripping storytelling that’s sure to keep true crime and boxing fans on the edge of their seats.
